title: Graph Processing on Distributed Dataflows
summary: A progressive implementation of distributed graph processing concepts, starting with GraphX's Pregel API and GAS decomposition (OSDI 2014), extending with GraphFrames' integrated relational+graph query API (GRADES 2016), and culminating in GraphScope's unified engine for traversal, analytics, and graph learning (PVLDB 2021).
instructionPreview: Implement a graph processing framework in Python that progressively builds three modules: 1. GraphX (graphx.py): Pregel API, PageRank, Connected Components, Triangle Count 2. GraphFrames (graphframes.py): DataFrame-based graph API with pattern matching 3. GraphScope (graphscope.py): Unified engine with Gremlin traversal, PIE model, SSSP, LPA, sampling
instruction:
Implement a graph processing framework in Python that progressively builds three modules:
1. GraphX (graphx.py): Pregel API, PageRank, Connected Components, Triangle Count
2. GraphFrames (graphframes.py): DataFrame-based graph API with pattern matching
3. GraphScope (graphscope.py): Unified engine with Gremlin traversal, PIE model, SSSP, LPA, sampling

Working directory: /workspace
Base code: graph.py (PropertyGraph class), data/ (test graphs)
Each module has a requirements YAML in requirements/ describing what to implement.
Update run.sh to output experiment results as KEY: VALUE lines.

moduleDag.description: A progressive implementation of distributed graph processing concepts, starting with GraphX's Pregel API and GAS decomposition (OSDI 2014), extending with GraphFrames' integrated relational+graph query API (GRADES 2016), and culminating in GraphScope's unified engine for traversal, analytics, and graph learning (PVLDB 2021).

nodes.label: GraphX: Graph Processing in a Distributed Dataflow Framework
nodes.description: Core graph processing abstraction: property graph as collections, Pregel API for bulk-synchronous computation, GAS decomposition, PageRank, Connected Components, Triangle Count.

nodes.label: GraphFrames: An Integrated API for Mixing Graph and Relational Queries
nodes.description: DataFrame-based graph API integrating relational queries with graph algorithms. Cypher-like pattern matching, view materialization, graph-aware query optimization.

nodes.label: GraphScope: A Unified Engine For Big Graph Processing
nodes.description: Unified engine for graph traversal (Gremlin), iterative algorithms (PIE model), and graph sampling. Combines traversal, pattern matching, analytics, and learning.

edges.label: GraphFrames extends GraphX with relational query integration
GraphScope unifies graph analytics, traversal, and learning
